sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">IG</title_>92 = Voluminis ix <title_ TEIform="title">partis</title_> i <title_ TEIform="title">editio minor,</title_> fasc. i = <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Aetoliae,</title_> ed. G. Klaffenbach, 1932. vol. xi = <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Deli:</title_> fasc. ii, ed. F. Dürrbach, 1912; fasc. 3 cited as <title_ TEIform="title">Inscr. Délos</title_> (q.v.); fasc. iv, ed. P. Roussel, 1914. vol. xii = <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones insularum maris Aegaei praeter Delum:</title_> fasc. i, <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Rhodi, Chalces, Carpathi cum Saro, Casi,</title_> ed. F. Hiller von Gaertringen, 1895. fasc. ii, <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Lesbi, Nesi, Tenedi,</title_> ed. W. Paton, 1899. fasc. iii, <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Symes, Teutlussae, Teli, Nisyri, Astypa- laeae, Anaphes, Therae et Therasiae, Pholegandri, Meli, Cimoli,</title_> ed. F. Hiller von Gaertringen, 1898; <title_ TEIform="title">Supplementa,</title_> ed. F. Hiller von Gaertringen 1904. fasc. v, <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Cycladum: pars</title_> i, <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Cycladum praeter Tenum,</title_> ed. F. Hiller von Gaertringen, 1903; <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii, </item>
